warnings.message:
URDF compile warning (collision, non-blocking materialization): isolated parts detected (not contacting any other part in the checked pose).
- part='inner_tray' nearest_part='middle_tray' approx_gap=0.002m pose_index=0 pose=(middle_to_inner_slide=0, outer_to_middle_slide=0) backend=fcl
- part='middle_tray' nearest_part='inner_tray' approx_gap=0.002m pose_index=0 pose=(middle_to_inner_slide=0, outer_to_middle_slide=0) backend=fcl
- part='outer_tray' nearest_part='middle_tray' approx_gap=0.002m pose_index=0 pose=(middle_to_inner_slide=0, outer_to_middle_slide=0) backend=fcl
Conservative collision envelopes still do not touch, so this is usually a real floating-part or bad-mount bug.
Adjust geometry origins or articulation placement so each isolated part is attached.
